reason: Cost-cut visuals and Power Rangers-style punchiness on video.
Animated slackers mishap their way across America in lo-fi glory.
Me-first bromance and cheap gags deliver straight-to-tape gold.
Summer-camp spoof with earnest heart and thrift-shop effects.
Clueless con man hides out in a satirical home-stay fornication.
Vegas-style showbiz cheese with over-the-top dance numbers.
Judge Dredd in cheap vinyl and sandwiches—so bad it’s beloved.
Mr. Bean’s silent clown routine reborn in homemade slapstick.
Tabloid mayhem and TV-news satire, direct from the bargain bin.
